title: Resistivity Measurement Configuration for OmniDAC-Part 2
author: Lim, Jihnyuk

steps.instruction: These videos show the later steps for configuraing an OmniDAC (by Almax easylab) for resistivity measurements. The intial steps can be found at 10.5281/zenodo.11551828 .
